# flashduty_fields (Data Source)

Retrieves all custom fields from Flashduty.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get all fields
data "flashduty_fields" "all" {}

# Output all field names
output "all_field_names" {
  value = [for field in data.flashduty_fields.all.fields : field.display_name]
}

# Find select fields
locals {
  select_fields = [for f in data.flashduty_fields.all.fields : f if f.field_type == "single_select" || f.field_type == "multi_select"]
}

output "select_field_count" {
  value = length(local.select_fields)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `fields` (Attributes List) List of custom fields. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--fields))

<a id="nestedatt--fields"></a>
### Nested Schema for `fields`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (Number) The timestamp when the field was created.
- `default_value` (String) The default value as JSON.
- `description` (String) The description of the field.
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the field.
- `field_name` (String) The name of the field.
- `field_type` (String) The type of the field.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the field.
- `options` (String) The available options as JSON array.
- `status` (String) The status of the field.
- `updated_at` (Number) The timestamp when the field was last updated.
- `value_type` (String) The value type of the field.
